definition: (now usually in the plural) Sanity.
example: to have a quick/sharp/dry/ready wit

definition: Receiving from someone's care what one has earlier entrusted to them. Usually refers to money.
example: You can make withdrawals of up to $250 a day.

definition: An exercise session; a period of physical exercise.
example: She does a 20-minute workout every morning.

definition: The condition of being worthy; honour, distinction.
example: an act/a place of worship

definition: The condition of being worthy; honour, distinction.
example: The Mayans built jungle pyramids to worship their gods.

definition: Good and important enough to spend time, effort, or money on.
example: It was in aid of a worthwhile cause (= a charity, etc.).

definition: A distinguished or eminent person
example: Very few of his ideas are worthy of further attention.

definition: A shout.
example: yell (at somebody/something) He yelled at the other driver.

definition: To pay, give in payment; repay, recompense; reward; requite.
example: a high crop yield

definition: To pay, give in payment; repay, recompense; reward; requite.
example: Higher-rate deposit accounts yield good returns.

definition: A young person.
example: The camp is for youngsters aged 8 to 14.
